_comment: ViT-Tiny ~165K-param matched-budget baseline on HLS4ML LHC jets 150p — cold start, 90 epochs. Width-shrunk from full ViT-Tiny (embed_dim 192->32, num_layers/mlp_ratio unchanged, num_heads 3->2). 162,373 params (verified via count_params.py against real ViTTiny). Matched to DepthViT k=4 baseline (164,417). Identical training protocol to the full ViT-Tiny 150p run for fair comparison.

data._comment_stats: TODO: replace with 150p-specific stats via scripts/compute_jet_stats.py. Currently using 100p stats as placeholder — kept IDENTICAL to the full ViT-Tiny 150p run so the matched-budget comparison is apples-to-apples.

model._comment: Width-shrunk ViT-Tiny: 12 layers, 32 hidden, 2 heads (head_dim 16), MLP ratio 4. patch=10 matches DepthViT tokenization (10x10 grid). 162,373 params. Depth and mlp_ratio held identical to full ViT-Tiny; only embed_dim narrowed (192->32) and heads 3->2 to keep head_dim>=16. Matched to DepthViT 164,417-param baseline.
